IMethodRouteSortOrder Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Gets or sets the priority for this route. By default, the method's sort order is used. Routes with a lower sort order are tried first.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManager
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
int SortOrder { get; set; }

Property Value

Type: Int32

IMethodRoute Interface
